blogTitle: A space to share development stories and daily life
aboutMe:
I work as a software engineer.
I enjoy learning new technologies and turning ideas into useful software.
I care about making clear, thoughtful experiences for the people who use what I build.
blogPageDescription: Notes on software, technology, and the things I learn along the way.
aiDisclaimer: AI-generated content may be inaccurate or misleading.
